name: Lifecycle Stability Proof (Kiaros Completion)
harness: jarvis/scripts/verify-voice-loop-e2e.mjs (mock SpeechRecognition + spied speechSynthesis over the real Desktop/Core/LLM stack)

proofs.five_turn_lifecycle: 8/8 PASS — each turn exactly 1 request, 1 spoken reply, auto-relisten
proofs.echo_filtered: PASS — own speech re-delivered, zero new messages
proofs.bounded_silence_to_ready: PASS — max 2 silent windows then ready
proofs.core_restart_mid_conversation: PASS — desktop reconnected without refresh; subsequent spoken turn completed

bugs_found_by_harness: short self-echo bypassed containment minimum (fixed with 7s exact-match window)
remaining_human_step: owner acceptance script in PHASE8_REPORT.md section 4 (physical mic/speaker)
platform_constraints: Chromium-family browser required for speech recognition
